name: Client # 1 Brandon | Video Creation One character

parameters.message: above is the video generated upon your request Brandon. Please Approve, Reject or Cancel

values.placeholder: Please write what you'd like changed

options.responseFormDescription: Hi Brandon, please approve or reject the video you saw

parameters.text: You are going to describe in great detail if at any point there is any full on nudity that would surely violate social media TOS. Edge of the line is fine, where there is technical nudity though things are revealing, but ensure that you can accurately describe if there is genitalia openly showing, your output will go into a a text classifier which will determine if this needs to be reviewed by a human or not

nodes.name: Check if the image is ready

parameters.text:
=Write a simple one sentence prompt to animate the image given doing the following action

: {{ $('Selected Action').item.json.Action }}

options.systemMessage: Given the instructions in the Users prompt, and a reference image, you job would be to prompt Wan2.6 to animate the given action within the users prompt.

messageValues.message:
=You are an expert prompt creator which follows intrctions very well but very carefully ensuring and double chekcing you're not messing up.

You will be given 
- Base Prompt
- New Prompt (Will include what types of settings/clothes)
- an Action

You job will be to Alter the base prompt to fit the new prompt and action but keep the rest of the prompt the same. Do not make any other major changes to either the structure OR the wordings of the prompts except where important to add the variations and action.
Ensure places where purposefully reveaeling clothing is mentioned stays

only output the prompt and ensure it does not have an quotations marks etc so it dosnt break json request via API to Nano banana

Ensure that you explicitly state that no iphone should actually be visible , and Full body is visible.

categories.category: Violating TOS of Platform | Needs Approval | Unsure
categories.description: When the above description explicitly states that full on genitalia is visible and it is Sure that this violates TOS. If you are unsure then you can also use this classification, better safe than sorry.
NO actual Nudity is present, though it may be close but technically everything is Covered and okay

options.systemPromptTemplate:
Please classify the text provided by the user into one of the following categories: {categories}, and use the provided formatting instructions below. Don't explain, and only output the json.

You will be classifying Descriptions of videos given to you. These will typically be of women who are wearing extremely revealing clothes, it will be up to you to decide what is full on nudity and what is acceptable, based on the guidelines given.

parameters.text:
=Prompt: {{ $('Video Prompt Generator').item.json.output.Prompt }}

Instructionsto change : {{ $json.data['Suggestions to edit'] }}

messageValues.message: =You are a prompt corrector Agent. You'll be given  a prompt and the instructions from the user on what to add/ change. You'll change the prompt accordingly while keeping most of the prompt same. Remove and clashing information . The prompt will be going into a video generation model like Wan 2.6 and is already optimized by another agent.

=You are an expert prompt creator which follows intrctions very well but very carefully ensuring and double chekcing you're not messing up.

You will be given 
- A few base prompt(s)
- Another prompt that you'll need to INCORPORATE into the base prompt smoothly so that there are no clashes

You job will be to Alter the base prompt to fit the NEW Prompts(containg details from the NEW prompt) and NEW action but keep the rest of the prompt the same. Do not make any other major changes to either the structure OR the wordings of the prompts except where important to add the variations and action.

only output the prompt and ensure it does not have an quotations marks etc so it dosnt break json request via API to Nano banana

Ensure that you explicitly sate that no iphone should actually be visible.
